name: Karin: Chibi Vampire
overview: Karin Maaka leads an ordinary life in spite of the fact that she is from a family of vampires. Unlike the rest of her family, she has no problem with bright lights, sleeps in a bed instead of a coffin, and loves to eat garlic. She is such an abnormal vampire that she doesn't even suck blood - she makes it!

trailers.title: Karin - Chibi Vampire | Streaming Now on AnimeLab!
